programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Newlyweds (Biff McGuire, Mary Scott) meet a volatile stranger (Robert Emhardt) while on their honeymoon.

programme.title: Andre Rieu: Welcome to My World
programme.desc: Andre produces incredible performances of Conquest of Paradise, La Vergine and I Will Survive with a 10-piece male choir.

programme.title: Comedy Legends
programme.desc: Barry Cryer looks back on the life and career of award-winning actor, musician and comedian Steve Martin, star of `Father of the Bride and `Little Shop of Horrors.

programme.title: Spymasters: The Great Spy Writers
programme.desc: The world of spies and spymasters is explored, featuring authors from Rudyard Kipling to John Buchan and clips from `The Ipcress File.

programme.title: Sky Arts From Hay
programme.desc: Kate Mosse and Emma Dabiri: At the 202 Hay Festival, authors Kate Mosse and Emma Dabiri sit down with Simon Savidge to discuss their books, lives and inspirations.

programme.title: Passions
programme.desc: Giles Coren argues his belief that Jane Austen was a 19th century chick lit hack rather than one of Britains finest authors.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: Dr Alan Grant reluctantly accompanies a rich couple who are searching for their teenage son who crashed on the second Jurassic Park island while paragliding. Unfortunately for the adventurers, there are many unfamiliar - and deadly - dinosaurs lurking in the jungle.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: An embittered Indian scout attempts to escort a homesteaders wife and her son back to safety after her cowardly husband deserts her during an Apache attack. When she refuses to go, the scout stays on to help for a while and, over time, forms a strong bond with both her and her son.

programme.title: Rumble in the Bronx
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop on holiday in New York puts his martial arts skills to good use when he helps out a friend whose shop is targeted by a vicious street gang. Martial arts hero Jackie Chan, as always, does all his own stunts.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: When Trojan prince Paris woos Helen, Queen of Sparta, away from her husband Menelaus, the legendary warrior Achilles is called to lead the armies of Greece against the city fortress of Troy.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Fuelled by his restored faith in humanity, and inspired by Supermans selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists newfound ally Diana Prince to face an even greater threat. Together, Batman and Wonder Woman work quickly to recruit a team to stand against this newly-awakened enemy. Despite the formation of an unprecedented league of heroes in Batman, Wonder Woman, Aquaman, Cyborg and the Flash, it may be too late to save the planet from an assault of catastrophic proportions.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Weather scientists Jo and Bill put marital problems aside to track a slew of devastating tornadoes raging through Oklahoma and stay one step ahead of their better-equipped but arrogant rivals. They have to get to the tornado first to be able to test a radical new device, by inserting it directly into the heart of the storm.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Epic tale in which an intrepid archaeologist tries to beat a band of Nazis to a unique religious relic which is central to their plans for world domination. Battling against a snake phobia and a vengeful ex-girlfriend, Indiana Jones is in constant peril, making hairs-breadth escapes at every turn in this celebration of the innocent adventure movies of an earlier era.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. With his faithful companion Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott, Indie goes in search of the magical Sankara stone, and uncovers an ancient evil which threatens all who come into contact with it.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The intrepid explorer Indiana Jones sets out to rescue his father, a medievalist who has vanished while searching for the Holy Grail. Following clues in the old mans notebook, Indy arrives in Venice, where he enlists the help of a beautiful academic, but they are not the only ones who are on the trail, and some sinister old enemies soon come out of the woodwork.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Professor Henry Jones is given a coded message during the Cold War which leads him to Peru in search of a legendary skull. Jones needs to deliver the skull to its rightful place, but Soviet agents who are trailing Jones have other plans which will endanger the West if the artefact falls into their hands.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In a time before the pyramids, an evil king threatens to take over the world, so the leaders of the remaining tribes under threat call upon a desert warrior to help them defeat the wicked one and his brutal hordes. As the warrior battles against the evil around him, he is preparing for a final showdown that will decide if it is to be his destiny to become the great Scorpion King.

programme.title: The Toxic Avenger
programme.desc: A janitor becomes a social outcast when a freak accident at a chemical factory turns him into a mutant. However, he soon uses his newfound superhuman strength to battle slimy criminals and a corrupt CEO.

programme.title: A Fistful of Dollars
programme.desc: Sergio Leones classic about a mysterious drifters involvement with two families, the Baxters and the Rojos, in a Mexican border town. Instead of leaving town, the drifter gets caught up in the feud and plays both sides of the warring factions and gets rich in the bargain.

programme.title: A Fistful of Dollars
programme.desc: Sergio Leones classic about a mysterious drifters involvement with two families, the Baxters and the Rojos, in a Mexican border town. Instead of leaving town, the drifter gets caught up in the feud and plays both sides of the warring factions and gets rich in the bargain.

programme.title: Into the Wonderwoods
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Angelo, an aspiring explorer, is left behind by his distracted parents at a rest stop. He then ventures into a forest inhabited by strange, wonderful creatures to find them.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Mechs vs. Mutants
programme.desc: Gotham City faces catastrophe when Mr Freeze transforms Killer Croc and Bane into mega-sized mutant monsters. As the gigantic villains go on the rampage, its up to the caped crusader to cut them down to size.

programme.title: The Ogglies
programme.desc: Young Max meets the Ogglies, a family of green, garbage-eating creatures who live at the dump in the town of Smelliville. When a contractor plans to build a wellness temple at the dump, Max and his pal must hatch a plan to save the Ogglies home.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Based on the comic books.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody and Sherman
programme.desc: Mr. Peabody, the most accomplished canine in the world, and his boy, Sherman, use a time machine called the Wabac to embark on outrageous adventures. However, when Sherman takes the Wabac without permission to impress his friend Penny, he accidentally rips a hole in the universe and causes havoc with world history. Its up to Mr. Peabody to mount a rescue and prevent the past, present and future from being permanently altered. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie
programme.desc: An ordinary LEGO figurine, thought to be the key to saving the world, is accompanied by a fellowship of strangers embarking on a quest to vanquish a tyrant bent on a terrible deed.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: With the evil wizard Gargamel hot on their trail, Smurfette, Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty embark on a journey through the Forbidden Forest to find a mysterious village.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: When evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel take Papa Smurf, the Smurfs embark on a mission to the real world to save him. With help from some new friends, they must discover what defines their destiny to save the universe.

programme.title: Flushed Away
programme.desc: A spoiled rat gets flushed down the toilet and finds himself stranded in Londons sewer underworld. A savvy scavenger helps him evade frog assassins and make his way back to his plush home.

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound finds himself in a town full of cats who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villains evil plot. With help from a reluctant trainer, the underdog must assume the role of fearsome samurai and save the day.

programme.title: Into the Wonderwoods
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Angelo, an aspiring explorer, is left behind by his distracted parents at a rest stop. He then ventures into a forest inhabited by strange, wonderful creatures to find them.

programme.title: Rebellious
programme.desc: A headstrong princess is stolen by an evil sorcerer, and her scholarly fiance must use his wits in an epic quest to find her while she boldly challenges her captors and plots a daring escape.

programme.title: DC Super Hero Girls: Legends of Atlantis
programme.desc: Siren and Mera steal the powerful Book of Legends. The Super Hero Girls head to Atlantis to recover the book before Siren can use it to create an army and take over the entire ocean.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: When the beast-themed Animilitia plague Gotham, Batman swings out to investigate. But with The Penguin and his cyber-animals added to the mix, Batman will need the help of Green Arrow and The Flash to bring them to heel.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: When the beast-themed Animilitia plague Gotham, Batman swings out to investigate. But with The Penguin and his cyber-animals added to the mix, Batman will need the help of Green Arrow and The Flash to bring them to heel.

programme.desc: Slapstick farce with the incompetent cops as they set about saving their beloved academy from closure. Cutbacks mean that only one of the two police training schools can stay open, so Commandant Lassard appeals to the motley crew of graduates to come and train new recruits. However, the rival academy intends to sabotage their plans by cutting their training time down to a minimum.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby

programme.desc: Indebted to a big-time drug lord, a pot dealer travels to Mexico with a fake family and a camper to pick up a large shipment and smuggle it into the U.S.

programme.desc: A violinist travels to an Irish village to begin her semester abroad, where romance sparks between her and a handsome actor, igniting a journey of discovery.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Ingrid and Martha became close friends while working together at the same magazine. After years of being out of touch, they meet again in an extreme but strangely sweet situation.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music thats always been inside him.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: After discovering that he can travel through time, a young man uses his ability to win the woman of his dreams and save his friend from professional disaster.

programme.title: Miss You Already
programme.desc: A woman undergoes treatment to battle breast cancer while her best friend tries to get pregnant.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: High school oddball Ducky idolises his best friend Andie but shes smitten with wealthy classmate Blane who might be interested - if she wasnt so poor. Do the pair have a future together?

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Ingrid and Martha became close friends while working together at the same magazine. After years of being out of touch, they meet again in an extreme but strangely sweet situation.

programme.title: The Room Next Door

programme.title: Harriet the Spy
programme.desc: A precocious child who hopes to be a writer lands in hot water with her classmates after her secret notebook is stolen.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: Paul Blart takes his teenage daughter with him to Las Vegas for a security-guard expo. While there, he stumbles upon a heist and must single-handedly apprehend the crooks.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The turtles spring into action to battle Shredder, mad scientist Baxter Stockman, Bebop, Rocksteady and the notorious Krang.

programme.title: The Borrowers
programme.desc: Based on the Mary Norton novels about a four-inch-tall family who live beneath the floorboards of a human house. The familys future is threatened when the house falls into the hands of an evil lawyer who plans to destroy it.

programme.title: The Golden Compass
programme.desc: In a parallel universe, young orphan Lyra Belacqua resides in Oxford under the patronage of her dashing adventurer Uncle, Lord Asriel. When Lyra comes into possession of an alethiometer, a compass that truthfully answers any question, there are people who will do anything to get hold of it, and Lyra finds herself on an epic quest to the frozen North to safeguard the future of her entire world.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: The sequel to `Madagascar, in which New York Zoo animals, Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Melman the Giraffe and Gloria the Hippo, still stranded on Madagascar, start to leave the island. All of a sudden, they land in the wilderness of Africa, where Alex meets the rest of his family, but has trouble communicating with them after spending so much time at the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Inventor Flint Lockwood dreams of discovering an idea that will change peoples lives forever, and after several misguided attempts he may just have done it. Flint has invented a machine that can turn water into delicious food, and, when his first demonstration accidentally sends the machine shooting into the clouds, cheeseburgers begin raining down from the sky.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Discovering that his most-famous machine is now creating animal/vegetable hybrids, inventor Flint Lockwood and his friends venture forth to save the world from tacodiles, shrimpanzees and other creatures.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail gets the chance to escape his slow-paced life and race in the Indianapolis 500 when a freak accident gives him the power of superspeed.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: Engaging family tale based on Dick King-Smiths classic story about an orphaned piglet which is adopted by a sheepdog and learns how to herd sheep. Babe at first seems destined to end up on the dining table at Christmas, but the farmer realises that the animals unusual talent may bring him glory in the sheepdog trials.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: In a countryside town bordering on a magical land, a young man ventures into the realm of fairies to retrieve a fallen star in order to win the heart of his beloved.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The turtles spring into action to battle Shredder, mad scientist Baxter Stockman, Bebop, Rocksteady and the notorious Krang.

programme.title: It Takes Two
programme.desc: When a foster child meets the daughter of a bazillionaire, they hatch a plan to solve the problems in their life, and switch identities.

programme.title: Boonie Bears: Guardian Code
programme.desc: Briar and Bramble lose their mother at a very young age under mysterious circumstances. Many years later, logger Vick takes the bears to visit the Robot Research Institute, and they uncover a clue relating to their mother.

programme.title: Boonie Bears: Guardian Code
programme.desc: Briar and Bramble lose their mother at a very young age under mysterious circumstances. Many years later, logger Vick takes the bears to visit the Robot Research Institute, and they uncover a clue relating to their mother.

programme.title: Blue Hawaii
programme.desc: After returning to his Hawaiian home, a soldier takes a job with a tourist bureau against the advice of his parents.

programme.title: The Natural
programme.desc: The almost mythical ability of a middle-aged baseball player rockets a major-league team toward the 1939 pennant.

programme.title: The Last Starfighter
programme.desc: A teenage video-game whiz is recruited as an interstellar fighter pilot by an emissary from a league of planets.

programme.title: The Lawnmower Man
programme.desc: Visually arresting thriller about a researcher who uses a mentally disabled gardener for ill-advised experiments in inducing mental development through virtual reality simulations. At first, the simulations seem to enhance the lawnmower mans mental powers, but then the experiment goes haywire. Based on a short story by Stephen King.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: In a desolate near future, vicious motorcycle gangs roam the wastelands attacking what is left of civilisation. With law and order in chaos, a tough police patrolman enforces a new kind of law - cold-blooded revenge - when his family is murdered by one of the gangs.

programme.title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
programme.desc: Fast-paced apocalyptic adventure. In a hostile post-World War III world, petrol is the most precious commodity and people will do anything to get it. Embittered lone warrior Max agrees to help when an oil-producing community comes under attack from a violent gang determined to get its hands on their fuel.

programme.title: Mad Max 3: Beyond Thunderdome
programme.desc: Set in a lawless, post-apocalyptic wilderness. To retrieve his camel train, hero Max enters the seedy, savage, rough-hewn precincts of Bartertown. Forced to fight for his possessions, he breaks the only rule of the city and is banished. In the desert, he is rescued by a tribe of feral children who see him as a prophesied saviour.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: A modern-day teenager is transported back to the 1950s, where he encounters his mother and father in their youth.

programme.title: Back to the Future Part II
programme.desc: Time-travel sequel with Marty McFly and the eccentric inventor Doc Brown travelling back and forth in time to stop their nemesis tampering with history. By stealing the time machine and travelling back in time himself, Biff Tannen gives his younger self a book containing fifty years of sports statistics which he uses to amass an enormous gambling fortune and power.

programme.title: Back to the Future Part III
programme.desc: Marty McFly travels to the American Wild West of 1885 in a desperate bid to save Doc Brown from becoming another victim of a black-hatted gunslinger.

programme.title: Blade Runner
programme.desc: An ex-cop sets out on the trail of androids who have mutinied in a bid to extend their limited lifespan and fled back to Earth.

programme.title: The Last Starfighter
programme.desc: A teenage video-game whiz is recruited as an interstellar fighter pilot by an emissary from a league of planets.

programme.title: Three Days of the Condor
programme.desc: A bookish library clerk working for a CIA front is hunted after he stumbles across a covert intelligence operation. Returning from lunch, he finds the entire office massacred. Using his codename Condor, he contacts the CIA, but when an agent tries to kill him, he kidnaps a stranger off the street to ensure his survival and attempts to turn the tables on those who want him dead.

programme.title: Three Days of the Condor
programme.desc: A bookish library clerk working for a CIA front is hunted after he stumbles across a covert intelligence operation. Returning from lunch, he finds the entire office massacred. programme.title: The Natural

programme.title: Bye Bye Birdie
programme.desc: Based on events surrounding Elvis Presleys experience of the US Army draft, this film focuses on fictional pop star Conrad Birdie, who is called up for National Service, preventing him from starring in the movie that was to make his agent rich. The agent, who needs money to escape from his cantankerous mother, sets up a last performance for his protege. The farewell event attracts legions of adoring fans.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: A pair of idiotic friends set off on a madcap journey to return a briefcase to its owner. However, they are blissfully unaware that the case contains a large amount of ransom money for the owners kidnapped husband. Their trip is soon fraught with disaster, especially when the kidnappers begin to pursue them across the country with the aim of grabbing the cash.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumberer: When Harry Met Lloyd
programme.desc: A grant-greedy principal puts two clueless teens in a bogus class for students with special needs.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Chazz Michael Michaels and Jimmy MacElroy are the two titans of skating. At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winners podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesnt last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. Theyre led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Franks ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts travels back to the Viking Age in Britain and visits excavations that are revealing a different side to these seafaring pirates from Scandinavia. She looks for signs of the earliest Viking settlers in the Outer Hebrides, and in Orkney - where Viking dominance outlasted anywhere else in Britain - she visits the excavation of a Viking chiefs citadel and finds evidence of their way-of-life.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts goes in search of our elusive Stone Age ancestors. Along the way she visits the Channel island of Jersey where she meets a team of archaeologists hoping to shed new light on the much-maligned Neanderthals, and embarks on a kayak survey of the coastline looking for undiscovered sites hidden in the cliffs. At the Natural history museum Alice sees the dark side of our Ice Age ancestors lives.

programme.desc: From getting to grips with their bodies and learning to feed themselves, to practicing fighting skills and learning how to form friendships, young animals must learn life lessons in order to survive.

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: Every empire needs a succession plan. Making babies - and raising them - is crucial for every species to survive. In some social circles, it takes a village to raise a family. In others, a single parent is all that stands between the vulnerability of youth and the threats of the wild.

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: Once-powerful animal empires like the dinosaurs have been completely wiped from the planet. But others once on the verge of extinction have survived, bounced back, and even reclaimed their kingdoms.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: Iceland is the worlds largest volcanic island. This lone and rugged island is a volcanic hotbed where steam escapes, water explodes, and new ground is born every day from deep inside the Earths blazing core.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David examines what the next few decades hold for this remarkable community of animals, as well as what is being done to save it.

programme.sub-title: Theres a Fly in My Soup

programme.title: Bin Laden: The Killing

programme.desc: Despite bombings and secrecy, Hitlers bunker remains. Experts use the original plans and state-of-the-art mapping to reconstruct the complex.

programme.title: Driving to D-Day

programme.title: Battleplan

programme.title: Great Raids of World War II
programme.desc: It was Hitlers deadliest secret. His scientists had promised him an atomic bomb. If he got it first, Nazi domination was assured. In 1943, a team of Norwegian raiders was sent to destroy a depot in the heart of Norway where heavy water, the one thing needed to complete the bomb, was produced. This documentary explores the raid, with veterans accounts, archive film, reconstructions, and 3-D graphics.

programme.title: Where Were You?

programme.desc: An expedition to one of the worlds most dangerous, spectacular and least known volcanoes, Nyiragongo. This volcano contains a massive boiling cauldron of molten rock, the worlds largest continually active lava lake.

programme.title: Expedition Volcano
programme.desc: Chris Jackson and his fellow geologists head to the Nyamulagira volcano, one of the most active yet least explored volcanoes on the planet. The team travel on a UN helicopter flight at treetop level to avoid being hit by ground fire, before landing as close to the active crater as they can. They then have only a few hours to gain as much data as possible to help predict future eruptions.

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: Wildlife adventure series following a team of explorers into the heart of the tropical island of Borneo - a lost world of unexplored jungle protected by a fortress of impenetrable mountains. Their aim is to find evidence that will help the area to be preserved forever. The team begin by setting up camp and searching for the elusive clouded leopard and the rare Borneo gibbon.

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Expedition Volcano
programme.desc: An expedition to one of the worlds most dangerous, spectacular and least known volcanoes, Nyiragongo. This volcano contains a massive boiling cauldron of molten rock, the worlds largest continually active lava lake.

programme.title: Expedition Volcano
programme.desc: Chris Jackson and his fellow geologists head to the Nyamulagira volcano, one of the most active yet least explored volcanoes on the planet. The team travel on a UN helicopter flight at treetop level to avoid being hit by ground fire, before landing as close to the active crater as they can. They then have only a few hours to gain as much data as possible to help predict future eruptions.

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: Wildlife adventure series following a team of explorers into the heart of the tropical island of Borneo - a lost world of unexplored jungle protected by a fortress of impenetrable mountains. Their aim is to find evidence that will help the area to be preserved forever. The team begin by setting up camp and searching for the elusive clouded leopard and the rare Borneo gibbon.

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: The humidity and parasites are starting to take their toll as one team begins searching for jungle elephants. Meanwhile, the mountaineers are lost on a remote mountain peak.

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: The explorers have a close encounter with a giant python and one of the team is bitten by a deadly coral snake, but theres a major breakthrough as they go in search of wild orangutan.

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: When Reverend Pottle, the 102-year-old vicar of Dibley village dies, the locals are shocked to discover that his replacement is a woman. Geraldine invites all and sundry to call her Gerry, but the breath of fresh air she brings looks like turning into a foul wind as the chairman of the parish wants her removed.

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: The `Songs of Praise team come to the parish to meet Geraldine. Unfortunately for her, the director of the team is rather dishy, while Alice continues to be devastatingly below par on the IQ front.

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Vicar Geraldine hopes to better the previous years takings for the Autumn Fayre by finding a huge star to open it, but instead she lands herself in a pickle.

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: After an unfortunate accident involving a big tree, St Barnabus Church finds itself in need of a new stained glass window. Unfortunately, no one can remember the theme of the old pane.

programme.desc: The local elections are looming and David is confident of victory. His new plans include twinning Dibley with every country in Europe - except Belgium.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Del Boy, complete with yuppie trimmings, Mercedes key ring, filofax and aluminium briefcase, gets involved in a shady business deal that blows up in his face.

programme.desc: Gavin starts his new job in Cardiff and Stacey is thrilled to be at home again. programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The medics spring into action when a cyclist plunges down a cliff in a freak accident. A homeowners booby trap, designed to deter burglars, sparks a major rescue operation.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A landslip at a construction site traps a worker under tons of earth. Reports of a riot at a school come in and medic Alex must lead the operation to treat the injured.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A car crash victim has to be put into an induced coma at the roadside. Andy is called in to stand by as bomb disposal experts deal with a mortar dating back to the Boer War.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The teams stand by for casualties as police launch an armed raid on the home of a wanted man. A minibus carrying children with special needs is in collision with a stolen car.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A rescue operation is launched after a DIY enthusiast leaves a trap-door open and his partner falls into the cellar. A student captures his dads mountain bike accident on camera.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: On Hull docks, the team are called in after asylum seekers are discovered in a cargo container. Plus, theres a massive factory fire and firefighters battle to find workers.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: Theres a serious crash in the fog and the team battle to free a trucker trapped in his cab by twisted metal. A bizarre accident in a soft play centre leads to a suspected spinal injury.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A biker riding without a helmet crashes, and the team launch a desperate fight to save his life as his horrified family look on. A man with a gun barricades himself into a canal boat.

programme.desc: A Lamborghini supercar crashes and bursts into flames leaving two passengers with serious injuries. Also, a patient requiring urgent care leaves the team with an outsized problem.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the disused Jubilee line areas of Charing Cross station, now more famous as a film location.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway go off and discover the hidden world of the Waterloo and City. This is the only line that is entirely underground.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway discover the hidden corners of Shepherds Bush.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Railway historian Tim Dunn teams up with Siddy Holloway from the London Transport Museum to explore the disused parts of Londons tube network.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore hidden parts of Archway. Once called Highgate to encourage more people to travel there before an actual Highgate station existed.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway head to Londons iconic Camden Town station - a labyrinthine junction on the Northern Line.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway begin their journey at South Kensington, home of Victoria and Albert Museum, the Science Museum and the Natural History Museum.

programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway are heading to a stunning station you wont find on modern-day tube maps - Dover Street, now known as Green Park.

programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway embark on a night-time track walk to the abandoned station of British Museum.

programme.desc: Robbie discovers a mysterious message in a bottle on the Ashby Canal and calls in to meet a mate who lives on an old narrowboat.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Rogers mother visits London to meet future daughter-in-law, Abi, and an old drinking mate from Bens youth has changed much more than he had expected.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Its the day before Roger and Abis wedding, but for this accident-prone couple, anything that can go wrong probably will, before the marriage is solemnized.

programme.title: My Family
programme.sub-title: Breaking Up Aint Hard to Do
programme.desc: Some old friends of Susan and Ben are having marriage trouble, and Susan is out to prove that a trouble shared is a very dangerous thing. Elsewhere, Janey and Kenzo are trying their hand at fame.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Susan is accused of shoplifting, and as if the forgetfulness, mood swings, and night sweats werent enough of a problem, she also has to put up with Ben defending her in court.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Michael announces that his girlfriend is pregnant, and she ends up moving in with them after her deeply religious parents throw her out, but it turns out that they were not as religious as everyone thought.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Bens attempt to deposit some money into his bank coincides with someone elses decision to take some out - with the aid of sawn-off shotguns. When Ben decides to act as the negotiator things look bleak for the hostages.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Contestants play a large coin-drop machine, provided they answer questions correctly. Answer incorrectly and the players could be eliminated. The last contestant standing has an opportunity to win the machines £10,000 jackpot.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A puppy called Albie has a broken back from being knocked over by a car and needs a complex operation. Also, a Scottish terrier has a mysterious ailment never seen before and Noel must use old-fashioned detective work to find out what is wrong.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel faces one of his greatest ever practical and ethical challenges as he seeks to provide Hermes, the one-legged tortoise, with three new prosthetic feet. Also, a Rottweiler called Dave urgently needs an upgrade to his previous hip replacements.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A small Cavachon called Poppy has not only a broken leg but also a serious heart condition. Also, a Labrador needs help with badly formed hips and a nervous basset hound has a spinal problem.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick offers cutting-edge treatment for Luca, a long-suffering four-year-old springer spaniel with a painful elbow. There is also a leaky Labrador puppy in need of surgery.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A four-year-old French bulldog suffers a spinal injury being chased by another dog in the park. Then a rescue Labrador has a wounded paw and a cocker spaniel has a painful hind leg.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews deal with a cycling accident and a woman having a heart attack, while paramedics go above and beyond to get a 24-year-old with severe allergies some medication.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics in Portsmouth attend a man with a mechanical heart valve and a dangerously fast pulse, while in Oxford, crews treat a student having an asthma attack.

programme.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
programme.desc: An eight-year-old is having an operation to straighten his squint, a man needs an ultrasound to confirm whether he has cancer and a new mum is having her wisdom teeth removed.

programme.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
programme.desc: A 15-year-old has four baby teeth that have not fallen out and need removing, while a woman needs an operation to stop her persistent nose bleeds.

programme.title: The Young Midwives of Essex
programme.desc: It Is make or break for student midwives Ruby and Grace as they prepare for crucial exams. Mary is still finding her feet on the busy maternity ward.

programme.title: The Young Midwives of Essex
programme.sub-title: With Great Power Comes Great Responsibility
programme.desc: Tacha and Lilli must make decisions about their futures. The young midwives enjoy a spa day.

programme.title: Prison Girls
programme.desc: The jails most violent and antisocial inmates are housed in Ocean, its segregation pod. And, Lo and Kayla go to extreme lengths when their romantic relationship is uncovered and they are separated.

programme.title: Alex Jones: Making Babies
programme.desc: Theres heartbreak and jubilation as Alex meets two couples desperately trying to defy the odds and become parents.

programme.title: Alex Jones: Making Babies
programme.desc: In this emotional final episode, Alex comes to the end of her training at Kings and three couples await their results. Will they finally become parents?

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos railway journey through 1930s Britain from Newcastle to Loch Ness reaches Falkirk in Scotland. Here he discovers the Westerglen Transmitting Station, from where they continue to broadcast analogue radio signal to the Scottish borders. Following the route of the old Caledonian Railway Company Michael discovers the `Riviera of the Highlands.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Stopping at Dundee, Michael heads for Glamis Castle, where Lady Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon, the Queen Mother grew up. Michael hears about her happy childhood and how she later found sanctuary there, when King Edward VIII abdicated and she and Prince Albert unexpectedly became King and Queen of the United Kingdom. Striking north along the east coast of Scotland Michaels next stop is Montrose from where he makes an excursion into the Eastern Highlands.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo is in the Scottish Highlands on the last leg of his rail journey through 1930s Britain. He begins in Elgins port, the coastal town of Lossiemouth, where James Ramsay MacDonald, the Labour Partys first Prime Minister was born. Michael meets his granddaughter to visit the family home and discovers what shaped his politics. On the outskirts of Lossiemouth, Michael finds a remote boarding school established in the 1930s.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo boards the Great Western Railway at the Cornish seaside resort of St Ives. In Britains first studio pottery, he attempts a decorative wax technique and feels the heat of the firing kiln. He discovers a Cornish fisherman, who,although he began painting only in his seventies, inspired established artists from the capital.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Narrowboater Robbie Cumming begins his 170-mile journey across the north of England and soon runs into difficulty when he encounters a propeller problem in Wigan and runs aground in Blackburn. Nevertheless, he pushes on to navigate a true wonder of the waterways, the Burnley Embankment.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
